series_metadata.series_title: Mandatory Pooling Operations Applications and Supplements
series_metadata.series_description: Applications for Mandatory Pooling Operations filed with the Division by an Operator and all Supplements to those Applications. This includes the cover letter and filing fee for the Application.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 7 years after the revocation of a mandatory pooling order; or 2 years after withdrawal of a pending application. ; Paper: 7 years after the revocation of a mandatory pooling order; or 2 years after withdrawal of a pending application. If records are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be shredded at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
